day_kind
code:
comptime MON = 0
comptime TUE = 1
comptime WED = 2
comptime THU = 3
comptime FRI = 4
comptime SAT = 5
comptime SUN = 6

def is_weekend(day: Int) -> Int:
    if day == SAT or day == SUN:
        return 1
    return 0

name: turn_right
code:
comptime D_NORTH = 0
comptime D_EAST = 1
comptime D_SOUTH = 2
comptime D_WEST = 3

def turn_right(dir: Int) -> Int:
    return (dir + 1) % 4

def turn_left(dir: Int) -> Int:
    return (dir + 3) % 4

    return 0

name: Triple_generic
code:
struct Triple[T: Comparable & ImplicitlyCopyable](Copyable, Movable):
    var a: Self.T
    var b: Self.T
    var c: Self.T

    def __init__(out self, var a: Self.T, var b: Self.T, var c: Self.T):
        self.a = a^
        self.b = b^
        self.c = c^

    def mid(self) -> Self.T:
        var m = self.a
        if self.b < m:
            m = self.b
        if self.c < m:
            m = self.c
        return m

code:
def swap_nibbles(b: UInt32) -> UInt32:
    var lo = b & 0x0F
    var hi = (b >> 4) & 0x0F
    return (lo << 4) | hi

def weighted_mean3(a: Float64, wa: Float64, b: Float64, wb: Float64, c: Float64, wc: Float64) -> Float64:
    return (a * wa + b * wb + c * wc) / (wa + wb + wc)

name: swap_refs
code:
def swap_refs[T: ImplicitlyCopyable & Movable](a: ref T, b: ref T):
    var t = a^
    a^ = b^
    b^ = t
